events.title: 3 Days OSHO Meditation Camp
events.description: Transformative 3-day OSHO meditation camp with certified facilitator Moksha
events.full_text:
3 Days OSHO Meditation Camp

Experience a transformative 3-day OSHO meditation camp, starting on 9th October.

Guided by certified facilitator Moksha, this retreat offers a deep dive into meditation practices.

Location: Tiruvannamali

Dates: 11th 4pm - 14th 4pm
